calendar.matters:
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT WING K. QUOCK, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF THE WING QUOCK TRUST
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Wing K. Quock, individually and as Trustee of the Wing Quock Trust.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:48:27 a.m and concluding at 10:09:36 a.m. (D505)

Georgeo William Wolff, Esq. representing Plaintiff Joseph P. Molloy doing business as Shamrock Engineering Concrete.
Defendant Wing K. Quock, individually and as Trustee of the Wing Quock Trust not appearing.

Complaint filed on Jan-31-2023.
Proof of service as to Defendant filed Mar-06-2023.
Default entered as to Defendant on Apr-10-2023 and Jul-03-2024.

Counsel to provide a summary in support of the request for judgment.
Court examines plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies.
Counsel confirms with the Court that the request for judgment shall resolve the entire case.

Proposed judgment is discussed.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant. The Court GRANTS judgment in favor of the Plaintiff.

Counsel for Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment on judicial council form for review and signature of the court.

Notice Of Intention To Move For And Motion For New Trial
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Notice of Intention to Move For and Motion For New Trial.

Dept.505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiffs: Proceedings reported by Brianna Rudd; CSR#13668; (209) 747.1306; briannarudd@gmail.com. (D505)

George Wolff, Esq. representing Plaintiff Joseph P. Molloy, Doing business as Shamrock Engineering Concrete, who was present, placed under oath but did not testify.
Defendant Wing K. Quock, Individually and as Trustee of the Wing Quock Trust not appearing.

Notice of Intention to Move for and Motion for New Trial filed Oct-16-2024.

The Court finds good cause to vacate the dismissal and GRANTS Plaintiff's motion for a new trial.
